This is a testharness.js-based test.

[FAIL] Magnetometer: Permissions-Policy allow='magnetometer' attribute allows cross-origin iframe
  test_feature_availability is not defined

[FAIL] UncalibratedMagnetometer: Permissions-Policy allow='magnetometer' attribute allows cross-origin iframe
